title: Freedom Inspirations Luxury 3Ply Toilet Roll - 45 Quilted Shea Butter Triple Soft and Scented Hygiene Bulk White Toilet Tissue and Loo Rolls
features: QUILTED TOUCH: This 3ply Freedom Inspirations Toilet Tissue is gentle on your skin and has a rich quilted surface that provides a feeling of tenderness and luxury.
DECO-EMBOSSED DESIGN: Featuring a deco-embossed design on a white pure pulp paper, these toilet tissues come in 5 packs of 9 rolls, in a total of 45 rolls (160 sheets per roll).

BULK BUY: Bulk Purchase this family essential with a pack of 45 triple soft quilted shea butter toilet rolls to ensure you never run out. It strikes the perfect balance between gentleness and firmness, leaving you and your family feeling refreshed and clean.
MICRO-IMPRESSIONS: Created with micro-impressions, Quilted, and ultra soft-to-touch yet absorbent and strong, with a touch of scented goodness, for the softness your skin deserves.
SUBTLE SCENT: Each roll releases a pleasing luxurious aroma helping to calm, soothe, and detoxify for a sense of added cleanliness and luxury.
description: Product Description 45 Rolls Quilted Shea Butter Hygiene Routine Freedom toilet paper is intended to be used whenever hygiene and comfort are top considerations. There are 3 layers of quilted softness on each sheet. Quilted Softness This hypoallergenic and safe quilted toilet paper, which will not irritate sensitive skin, provides you with comfort and ease. Soft, Strong & Absorbent Freedom Inspirations has the balance of softness and strength to leave you and your family feeling fresh and clean. 3PLY Freedom Inspirations 3-ply toilet paper is made from three layers of ultra-soft white tissue paper for the most effective absorbency.
